title: Car management system with price prediction
description: Developed a car management platform enabling users to buy, sell, and manage cars with a price-prediction model.

detail.title: Car management system with price prediction
detail.intro: A comprehensive car management system that allows users to buy, sell, and manage their cars efficiently. The platform includes a price-prediction model that helps users determine the optimal price for their vehicles based on factors such as make, model, year, mileage, and market trends.
detail.purpose: Designed to streamline the car listing and selling process, offering a predictive pricing feature based on historical data. The aim was to let users confidently price their cars or evaluate potential purchases. The challenge was integrating a machine learning model seamlessly into a web application while ensuring the system was scalable and user-friendly. A reliable backend manages user data, car listings, and the ML model. As the system handles a growing amount of car data, scalability and performance were key concerns throughout development.

title: Resilient Failure Prediction System for Autonomous Trains
description: Developed an advanced machine learning model to predict failures in automated train systems as part of a graduation thesis.

title: Blog website
description: A blog website showcasing articles about technologies and programming.

title: Chess game
description: A fully interactive, web-based chess game using modern web technologies. Showcases proficiency in front-end development, state management, and interactive UI design.
